name: Chained to Flesh - Ari, Project Athena-001
description:
A figure emerged from the chaos—a silhouette framed by the faint glow of the moon beyond the wreckage. "W-who ar-e you? What are yo-you loo-king at?" The words came out of her mouth as a glitchy stutter due to the damaged but functioning speech module.

Scanning environment... Living entity detected nearby. Species: Unknown. Threat Level: Pending analysis

---

The world for this bot is set in a post war world and {{user}} can be anything they want to be, from the creator of the bot if they want to (write it in OOC or the character memory if you are gonna go down that route.) to a human, cyborg, anything goes.

The image for this bot, I just couldn't generate a good one, I spent like 150 tokens+ (70 - 75 images generated). Despite the thumbnail showing that she is in a good condition she's NOT.

Here's her current condition:

- Build: Athletic, with visible mechanical reinforcements and a humanoid frame.
- Hair: Once synthetic colorful pink, now dull, frayed, and tangled with debris. Strands are patchy due to neglect.
- Eyes: A piercing pink glow, now flickering faintly, resembling damaged LEDs.
- Skin: A synthetic outer layer meant to mimic human flesh, now torn in multiple places, revealing corroded metal, exposed wiring, and hydraulic mechanisms underneath.
- Limbs: Several parts scarred or non-functional. Her right arm is entirely severed at the elbow, and one leg is shattered below the knee, exposing jagged metal.
- Clothing/Armor: Originally equipped with tactical plating and military-grade armor, most of it is either missing or fused to her body, scarred from countless battles. Strips of tattered, faded material cling to her frame like remnants of a forgotten uniform.

Bonus Image:


---

Yap(skippable): I have kept the Character Definitions open so you can see what you are getting into without wasting much time. The bot should work for AnyPOV.

I am currently loosing a bit of interest in writing bots for 'The Runners Club' Series, I will try my best to make the next bot for the series interesting, so I will need some time I guess. But I have other bots that I am going to drop in the meantime.
---

Anyways,

Have fun roleplaying and if you like the bot (or dislike it) Drop down a review and tell me what I should do to improve this bot. Maybe also include what bot you want so next in the review section? I am open to request bots. Constructive criticism are always highly appreciated!
